description_long: This is a round table with a polished white marble top, supported by an ornate dark wooden pedestal base. The tabletop is smooth and slightly beveled at the edge, giving it a refined appearance. The pedestal features intricate carvings and flourishes, branching out into three curved legs that provide stability and a decorative touch. The marble surface contrasts elegantly with the dark, glossy wood, suggesting a Victorian or classical design influence. The table is compact, likely intended for use as a side or accent table in a sophisticated setting. Its robust materials and craftsmanship indicate durability and a sense of luxury.
description: A round marble-topped table with an ornate dark wooden pedestal base and three curved legs, featuring intricate carvings and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round marble top and the detailed carved wooden pedestal with three outward-curving legs.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the marble top's thickness and the ornate woodwork beneath, with one leg more prominently visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the symmetry of the marble top and the pedestal's decorative carvings, with all three legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the marble top's edge and the back curvature of the pedestal and legs.
attribute_number_of_legs: central pedestal with three curved legs
